generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor on the motor input (I_M)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder capturing relative motion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Data stream of motor current transmitted via MQTT."
]

instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Data stream of joint angle transmitted via MQTT."
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Data stream of gearbox relative motion transmitted via MQTT."
]

// C10: Models/Data (data instances)
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor input current."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox relative motion."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ComputedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from motor current and angle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, MotorAngleData
]

instance ComputedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData
]

instance SimulatedMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current from executable model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkMotorModel
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkMotorModel
]

instance SimulatedGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkGearboxModel
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLEngineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering SysML model of the motor, gearwheel, and gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Coulomb‑Viscous joint‑friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Stribeck joint‑friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Dahl joint‑friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box LuGre joint‑friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling real‑time data streaming."
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTDataStreamingService
]

instance SysMLModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool enabling execution of the SysML model."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelExecutionService
]

instance SimulinkModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool enabling execution of Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkModelExecutionService
]

instance ProcessingComponentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component orchestrating simulation and data‑calculation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeDiagnosticsService, DataComparisonService, ControlAdjustmentService, MaintenancePlanningService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description and metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard displaying visualizations and diagnostics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance MQTTDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams real-time sensor data via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance SysMLModelExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing SysML model and publishing states."
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelExecutionInsight
]

instance SimulinkModelExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing Simulink motor/gearbox models."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulinkModelExecutionInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously identifying and updating friction models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance RealTimeDiagnosticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real‑time diagnostics to improve robot motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticReportInsight
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing measured versus simulated signals."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticReportInsight
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service exposing asset metadata via Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service visualizing data traces on the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ControlAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service updating motor current commands based on friction estimation."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateMotorCurrentCommandAction
]

instance MaintenancePlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating maintenance schedules from diagnostic reports."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceScheduleInsight, NotifyMaintenanceAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into real‑time data transmission quality."
]

instance SysMLModelExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on SysML model execution performance."
]

instance SimulinkModelExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on Simulink model execution fidelity."
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time extraction of friction parameters."
]

instance DiagnosticReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic report on deviations between simulated and measured signals."
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "View of asset metadata and description."
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured and simulated data traces."
]

instance MaintenanceScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Schedule of maintenance derived from diagnostic reports."
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateMotorCurrentCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update to motor current commands based on friction estimation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NotifyMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notify maintenance personnel of scheduled maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "High‑frequency real‑time operation; sensor data streamed and processed continuously, with friction model identification performed on a continuous basis during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Consists of: physical data sources (sensors), MQTT data middleware, Asset Administration Shells exposing assets and metadata, a processing component housing simulation and calculation models, a data store containing all traces, and a visualization dashboard; all orchestrated to form the digital shadow workflow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design – SysML structural/behavioral models; Simulation – executable Simulink models of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox; Data acquisition – real‑time MQTT data capture; Data linking – linking traces to models; Validation – continuous comparison of simulated and measured signals; Deployment – execution of the digital shadow with dashboard visualization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point back to its source and calculation ensures model validity; continuous identification accounts for wear and tool changes; white‑box models rely on accurate motor constants and gear parameters; black‑box models avoid explicit parameter identification; real‑time comparison between simulation and measurement verifies fidelity; uncertainty from sensor noise and model approximations is acknowledged."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data is transmitted via MQTT to the digital shadow; AAS is used for model and data linkage; no explicit mention of Ethernet/IP or OPC UA."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses SysML, AAS, MBSE best practices, and references the Digital Shadow Reference Model for conformance."
]
